chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Cr. Rev. A. No.154 of 2025 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. FOR ORDER ON MA NO.9520/25 2. FOR HEARING OF CASE 24.9.2025 None present for applicant. On the previous date, applicant and his counsel was also called absent. It seems that the applicant has lost his interest in the instant case, which is dismissed for non- prosecution. JUDGE asim/PA
